attacking_style: Capable of attacking steep uphill finishes from distance despite time trial pedigree, leveraging power sustainability rather than explosive acceleration.
team_tactics: Primarily deployed as high-powered domestique for Jumbo-Visma leaders, pacing deep into climbs to soften opposition before leader attacks.
terrain_preference: Steep uphill finishes suit his sustained power output; time trial background enables attacks from distance on gradient rather than explosive summit finishes.
vulnerability: Role as domestique suggests potential inability to finish off own attacks when protecting team leadership; may lack final acceleration against pure climbers.
key_patterns: Functions as elite mountain domestique despite time trial world champion pedigree (2 observations)
Paces team leaders deep into climbs, unusual high-quality domestique role (2 observations)
Podium results as support rider demonstrate exceptional engine for prolonged efforts (2 observations)
Attacks steep gradients from distance using sustained power, not explosive moves (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: showing versatility beyond time trial specialization with strong mountain support role and uphill attack capability demonstrated in spring 2022
